inputs.label: Invoice Value
inputs.businessContext: The value of goods as stated on the commercial invoice.

inputs.label: Insurance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of insuring the shipment during transit.

inputs.label: Freight Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of transporting the goods to the destination port.

inputs.label: Duty Rate
inputs.businessContext: Ad valorem customs duty rate for the imported goods.

inputs.label: VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: Value Added Tax rate applied to the tax base.

inputs.label: Additional Fees
inputs.businessContext: Other costs such as customs brokering or terminal handling charges.
